text:
(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #1)

In my 4.13 branch (for 2.1.4 release), I have also a patch [1], which fixes warnings (need to be reviewed by upstream).

[1] https://app.assembla.com/spaces/xfce4/subversion/source/HEAD/tags/4.13/x11/xfce4-whiskermenu-plugin/files/patch-panel-plugin_launcher.h
